case_title: ERICKSEN, JORUNN vs. PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ERICKSEN, JORUNN AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC COMPANY DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-06-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-07-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-17-1996
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ERICKSEN, JORUNN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-06-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-06-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC TO PLAINTIFF & PLTF'S COUNSEL FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AND FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH MANDATORY COURT RULES. HEARING SET FOR SEP-05-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ERICKSEN, JORUNN

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-05-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT HEARING SET FOR OCT-07-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-07-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-07-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE. NO APPEARANCE AND/OR GOOD CAUSE MAY RESULT IN DISMISSAL., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-06-1996 CONTINUED FROM OCT-07-1996 TO NOV-06-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ERICKSEN, JORUNN
